description: Each timepiece from giordano has an elegant, contemporary look and advanced Japanese movements, seamlessly blended with classic, timeless designs. A watch designed for modern life but remaining true to its heritage. Case diameter: 38 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 1 Year Stainless steel case for durability, style and comfort Black leather strap with a tang clasp Black dial with two chronograph displays and date aperture at the 3 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Branding at the 9 hour mark Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rainWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
